name: September 2019 repo market stress
why_fizzled: Brief market plumbing event; Fed intervention contained the stress. Narrative emerged but did not sustain past ~3 weeks. Genuinely a non-anchor — useful as control.
fizzle_evidence: Articles per day in narrative cluster declined below 5/day by mid-October 2019 with no resurgence. Did not generate sustained interpretive discourse comparable to SVB or Credit Suisse.
_seed_status: DRAFT — confirm via initial corpus inspection before locking. See README for protocol.

name: Q4 2018 recession scare
why_fizzled: Recession-watch narrative driven by Q4 2018 selloff and yield curve flattening. Powell's January 2019 pivot to dovish stance dissolved the narrative within 6-8 weeks. NBER never dated a 2019 recession.
fizzle_evidence: Narrative volume peaked late December 2018, decayed sharply through January-February 2019.
_seed_status: DRAFT — confirm via initial corpus inspection before locking.

name: August 2024 yen carry trade unwind
why_fizzled: Sharp emergence from BOJ rate decision and Nikkei drop early August 2024. Markets stabilized within ~2 weeks; narrative did not sustain into Q4.
fizzle_evidence: Volume peaked Aug 5-7, declined steadily, off the front page by late August.
_seed_status: DRAFT — confirm via initial corpus inspection before locking.

name: First Republic resilience narrative (March 2023)
why_fizzled: Mid-March narrative that the consortium deposit had stabilized First Republic. Narrative emerged March 16, persisted ~3 weeks, then collapsed when First Republic failed May 1. Useful as a 'fizzled into reality' counterpart.
fizzle_evidence: Stabilization narrative volume declined steadily April; actual failure May 1 generated a different narrative cluster.
_seed_status: DRAFT — confirm via initial corpus inspection before locking. NOTE: this is a 'falsified' narrative rather than purely fizzled; useful test case but document carefully.

name: Imminent recession 2022 narrative
why_fizzled: Recession-imminent narrative that ran roughly 12 months without an NBER recession materializing. Eventually displaced by soft-landing narrative (anchor_10).
fizzle_evidence: Narrative volume gradually declined as recession failed to materialize and disinflation continued. Effectively replaced by soft-landing framing by late 2023.
_seed_status: DRAFT — IMPORTANT: this narrative was *prominent* and sustained, even though it was wrong. It tests whether the system distinguishes 'sustained but falsified' from 'sustained and validated'. Keep separately tracked.
